qa.default.title: Quick default provider setup
qa.default.description: Choose a default LLM provider with the minimum required configuration.
qa.setup.title: Personalized provider setup
qa.setup.description: Choose the provider style you want, then customize endpoint, authentication, model, and timeout defaults.
qa.update.title: Update component configuration
qa.update.description: Choose which area to update, then answer only the relevant follow-up questions.
qa.remove.title: Remove component configuration
qa.remove.description: Confirm that this component configuration should be removed.
qa.field.confirm_remove.label: Remove this component configuration?
qa.field.provider.label: Which LLM provider do you want to use by default?
qa.field.provider.help: Choose the provider this component should use by default. Built-in providers use standard endpoints and runtime defaults unless you override them.
qa.field.use_standard_endpoint.label: Use the standard API endpoint for this provider?
qa.field.use_standard_endpoint.help: Choose Yes to use the built-in endpoint for the selected provider, or No to supply a custom base URL.
qa.field.base_url.label: Base URL
qa.field.base_url.help: Enter the provider base URL such as https://my-llm.example.com/v1.
qa.field.endpoint_requires_api_key.label: Does this endpoint require an API key?
qa.field.endpoint_requires_api_key.help: Choose Yes if requests to this endpoint must send an API key.
qa.field.api_key_secret.label: API key secret name
qa.field.api_key_secret.help: Enter the name of the stored secret to use at runtime, not the API key itself.
qa.field.default_model.label: Default model
qa.field.default_model.help: Leave blank to use the provider default. For custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints, enter the model name that endpoint expects.
qa.field.timeout_behavior.label: Timeout handling
qa.field.timeout_behavior.help: Choose whether to use the runtime default timeout or set a custom timeout in milliseconds.
qa.field.timeout_ms.label: Timeout in milliseconds
qa.field.timeout_ms.help: Enter a non-negative timeout in milliseconds.
qa.field.update_area.label: Which area would you like to update?
qa.field.update_area.help: Choose one area to update, then answer only the follow-up questions for that area.
